title: NodeAcceleration
description: NodeAcceleration: Resulting acceleration and angular acceleration for a Node.

UX.description: Acceleration in the X-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Acceleration meassured in [m/s²].

UY.description: Acceleration in the Y-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Acceleration meassured in [m/s²].

UZ.description: Acceleration in the Z-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Acceleration meassured in [m/s²].

RX.description: Rotational acceleration about the X-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type AngularAcceleration meassured in [rad/s²].

RY.description: Rotational acceleration about the Y-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type AngularAcceleration meassured in [rad/s²].

RZ.description: Rotational acceleration about the Z-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type AngularAcceleration meassured in [rad/s²].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
